Head-to-head ties even at 2-3-4 for Bari-Entella-draws, underscoring competitiveness. Bari's E. Darboe remains sidelined by thigh injury, while no fresh suspensions or major knocks alter lineups significantly; survival pressure and Bari's home edge shape trader consensus for a low-scoring affair.

markets.question: Will the Democratic Party win the CA-26 House seat?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the CA-26 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

Incumbent Julia Brownley's January retirement opened the race, but a crowded Democratic primary field—led by well-funded state Sen. Jacqui Irwin with over $556,000 raised—dominates over fragmented Republicans like Samuel Gallucci, whose fundraising lags significantly per March FEC filings. With the top-two nonpartisan primary looming on June 2, markets anticipate two Democrats advancing to November's general election. Upsets could arise from a GOP consolidation for second place, a Democratic scandal, or national midterm dynamics shifting turnout in Ventura County.

markets.question: Will Xi Jinping win the Nobel Peace Prize in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the winner of the 2026 Nobel Peace Prize, as announced by the Norwegian Nobel Committee.

If multiple listed individuals or entities jointly receive the prize, the market will resolve to a single winner. If Donald Trump, Volodymyr Zelenskyy,  Benjamin Netanyahu, Vladimir Putin, or Elon Musk are among the recipients, the market will resolve to the highest-ranked among them in that exact order of precedence. If none of those five are among the winners and the prize is awarded jointly to at least one listed individual and at least one listed organization, the market will resolve in favor of the individual. If no prioritized individuals are among the winners and all listed recipients are of the same type (all individuals or all organizations), the market will resolve to the person whose last name, or the entity’s name, comes first in alphabetical order as listed in this market.

If no official announcement regarding the 2026 Nobel Peace Prize has been made by March 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other."

The resolution source for this market will be the first official announcement from the Norwegian Nobel Committee.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket reflects a fragmented field following the Norwegian Nobel Committee's April 30 announcement of 287 nominees—208 individuals and 79 organizations—for the 2026 Nobel Peace Prize, with Yulia Navalnaya edging out Volodymyr Zelenskyy at 8.0% and 7.8% implied probabilities amid buzz over her role as a Russian opposition symbol post-Alexei Navalny. Zelenskyy's standing stems from his repeated nominations highlighting Ukrainian resilience, while Donald Trump's 6.5% draws from public endorsements by leaders in Cambodia, Israel, and Pakistan, evoking his past diplomatic pushes. No clear frontrunner dominates in this secretive process, where human rights narratives and geopolitical tensions create volatility; the October 10 announcement remains the key catalyst for shifts.

markets.question: Will OpenAI’s market cap be less than $500B at market close on IPO day by December 31, 2027?
markets.description:
This market will resolve based on OpenAI's market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading.

If no IPO occurs by December 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "No IPO by December 31, 2027".

Market capitalization expresses the monetary value of a company’s outstanding shares, stated in its pricing currency. It is calculated as the number of shares outstanding multiplied by the closing share price on the first trading day.

If the relevant value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

Resolution will be based on the primary exchange’s official listing page. In the event that the relevant figure is not displayed, another reliable source will be used.

In the event of an interruption in the course of the normal trading session on OpenAI’s first day of trading (e.g., a circuit breaker or half-day), the market will resolve according to the official closing price of the abbreviated session. If no such official closing price is published, the market will resolve according to the next trading day on which an official closing price is published, treating that as the first day of trading for purposes of this market.

This positions 750B–1T (31.5%) and 500–750B (33.0%) as competitive alternatives, anchored to the recent private valuation benchmark, while 1T–1.25T (31.0%) and 1.25T–1.5T (27.5%) capture expectations of further growth from revenue expansion and enterprise adoption. However, a 23.0% chance of no IPO by December 31, 2027, stems from fresh reports of missed revenue and user targets, CFO Sarah Friar's public doubts on 2026 readiness amid $121 billion projected compute spending, and internal tensions—highlighting execution risks ahead of a potential Q4 2026 listing.

markets.question: Will UBS or any of its underwriting affiliates serve as the lead underwriter in SpaceX’s initial public offering?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the bank that serves as the lead underwriter in the initial public offering of SpaceX.

If no IPO occurs by December 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, or SpaceX completes an initial public offering without a designated lead underwriter, this market will resolve to “Other.”

If multiple banks are identified as lead underwriters, this market will resolve according to the primary lead underwriter. If the hierarchy between them is unclear, this market will resolve once it is conclusively evident which bank is the primary lead underwriter, for example, through the order in which the banks are listed in the underwriting section of SpaceX’s final initial public offering prospectus, once released.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official disclosures from SpaceX. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket positions Morgan Stanley as the frontrunner at 39% implied probability to serve as lead underwriter for SpaceX's anticipated Project Apex IPO, targeted for June 2026 at a potential $1.75 trillion valuation and $75 billion raise—the largest in history. This reflects Morgan Stanley's deep ties to Elon Musk, including leading Tesla's IPO and banker Michael Grimes spearheading SpaceX's final bake-off presentation at Starbase. Recent April reports confirmed a 21-bank syndicate with Morgan Stanley, Bank of America (19.4%), and Goldman Sachs (17%) in senior bookrunner roles, alongside JPMorgan, amid a virtual banker meeting on April 6 outlining prospectus release in late May and roadshow starting June 8. Uncertainty persists as SpaceX may list banks alphabetically, forgoing a traditional "lead left" designation, with no official hierarchy announced yet.

markets.question: Will Mohamed Salah play in Scottish Premiership next?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the league of next club that Mohamed Salah officially joins by August 31, 2026 at 2:00 PM ET.

If Mohamed Salah does not officially join a new club by August 31, 2026 at 2:00 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”.

If Mohamed Salah signs a contract that includes a delayed transfer or loan-back clause requiring him to remain at Liverpool for a specified period before joining another club, this market will resolve to the club he is officially contracted to join following that period.

If Mohamed Salah joins a club in a league that is not listed, this market will resolve to “Other”.

If Mohamed Salah is released, retires, or is not under contract with any professional club by August 31, 2026 at 2:00 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”.

Transfers or assignments between a club’s senior team and reserve or affiliate teams will not be considered for this market.

An official transfer announcement prior to the market’s close date will immediately resolve this market to the corresponding option.

The primary resolution sources for this market will be official announcements from Liverpool, Mohamed Salah and/or the acquiring club. A consensus of credible media reporting may also be used to resolve the market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Mohamed Salah's March 24 announcement to depart Liverpool as a free agent at the end of the 2025/26 Premier League season has ignited a fiercely competitive race for his signature, with trader consensus tightly clustered around Saudi Pro League (45.5% implied probability), Egyptian Premier League (39.8%), and Primeira Liga (39.5%). Renewed Saudi pursuits by Al-Ittihad and Al-Hilal, backed by massive financial incentives and prior summer links, edge it ahead, yet reports of Salah rejecting multimillion-pound offers for a potential European giants move—echoing Roma interest—bolster Primeira Liga bids amid Portugal's appeal for high-profile wingers. Egyptian homecoming sentiment, fueled by his national icon status and Al Ahly whispers, keeps that path viable, while MLS expansion sides like San Diego FC add pressure. This bunched pricing highlights traders' split on Salah prioritizing lucrative deals, legacy return, or competitive European football in his mid-30s.

markets.question: Madrid Open: Mirra Andreeva vs Marta Kostyuk
markets.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Mirra Andreeva and Marta Kostyuk in the Madrid Open, originally scheduled for May 1, 2026 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Mirra Andreeva' if Mirra Andreeva advances against Marta Kostyuk.

This market will resolve to 'Marta Kostyuk' if Marta Kostyuk advances against Mirra Andreeva.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

Andreeva boasts an elite clay record of 45-12 lifetime and 20-4 over the past year, thriving on the surface with prior deep runs here, while Kostyuk remains undefeated at 10-0 this clay season after upsetting top seeds. Kostyuk leads their head-to-head 1-0 from a hard-court Brisbane clash in January, but no current injury concerns affect either; traders weigh Andreeva's surface edge against Kostyuk's momentum in this high-stakes WTA 1000 decider.

The primary resolution source will be official information from NFL (https://www.nfl.com/); however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Ethereal FDV above $600M one day after launch?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Fully Diluted Valuation of Ethereal's governance token is greater than the value specified in the title 1 day after launch. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No."

The token must be actively, publicly transferable and tradable to be considered a launch.

The FDV will be determined using the total token supply multiplied by the token price.

"1 day after launch" is defined as 4:00 PM ET on the calendar day following launch. The resolution source for this market is the most liquid price source available. If Ethereal (https://x.com/etherealdex) doesn't launch a token by December 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

markets.question: Valentova vs. Tagger: Set 1 Games O/U 8.5
markets.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Tereza Valentova and Lilli Tagger in the Saint-Malo, originally scheduled for May 1, 2026 at 4:00AM ET.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed in the first set equals or exceeds 9. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
Any first-set tiebreak counts as one (1) game toward the total.
If the first set is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins, or delayed beyond 7 days without commencement, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official WTA Challenger results.

events.title: Saint-Malo: Tereza Valentova vs Lilli Tagger
events.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Tereza Valentova and Lilli Tagger in the Saint-Malo, originally scheduled for May 1, 2026 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Tereza Valentova' if Tereza Valentova advances against Lilli Tagger.

This market will resolve to 'Lilli Tagger' if Lilli Tagger advances against Tereza Valentova.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Top-seeded Tereza Valentova (WTA No. 51) holds a clear edge over Lilli Tagger (No. 91) in the L'Open 35 de Saint-Malo WTA 125 quarterfinals on outdoor clay, fueled by her dominant run through Sloane Stephens (6-4, 6-1) and Claire Liu (2-6, 6-2, 6-2) in the prior rounds. The 19-year-old Czech has peaked at No. 43 this year, thriving on the surface with consistent baseline play. Tagger, an 18-year-old Austrian riser boasting a 16-7 2026 record, upset Amandine Monnot but faces her first career meeting against the higher-ranked Valentova, whose superior Elo rating and seeding reflect trader consensus on experience amid no reported injuries or withdrawals.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus favors Abdul El-Sayed at 50.5% to win Michigan's August 4 Democratic U.S. Senate primary, reflecting his recent polling surge—including an eight-point gain to tie Mallory McMorrow at 24% in the April Emerson survey—and strong Q1 fundraising of $2.27 million from small donors, outpacing Haley Stevens. El-Sayed's appeal to younger voters, progressives backing Medicare for All, and standing ovation at the Michigan Democratic Party convention have boosted momentum amid high undecideds (35-36%). McMorrow holds 31% on grassroots fundraising leadership ($2.96 million) despite backlash over deleted tweets disparaging Michigan, while Stevens trails at 14.8% after lagging funds despite narrow leads in some polls like Glengariff's. The three-way contest remains fluid with ad campaigns looming.

markets.question: Will the Democratic Party win the NM-01 House seat?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the NM-01 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

Melanie Stansbury (D) commands trader consensus at 91% implied probability to win New Mexico's 1st Congressional District, reflecting the seat's solid Democratic lean—demonstrated by strong partisan voting index and Harris's 2024 margin—and her fundraising dominance over Republican nominee Ndidiamaka "Didi" Okpareke, a pharmacist who secured the unopposed GOP nod in March. With no public polling indicating competitiveness and primaries set for June 2, the race aligns with historical incumbency advantages in safe districts. Challenges would require a Stansbury scandal, massive GOP national midterm wave, or Okpareke fundraising surge, though structural barriers remain high.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus heavily favors Europe at 72.5% implied probability to win the 2026 FIFA World Cup, driven by UEFA's 16 qualifiers including powerhouses Spain, France, England, Germany, Portugal, and Netherlands—topping power rankings after dominating Euro 2024 and Nations League form. The March qualifiers' playoff drama, with Bosnia & Herzegovina upsetting Italy and Sweden, Turkey, Czechia advancing, solidified Europe's depth amid the expanded 48-team field. South America's 20.5% reflects CONMEBOL standouts Argentina (defending champions) and Brazil, but limited to seven slots lacks matching breadth. Asia, Africa, North America, and Oceania trail below 3% each, boosted by debuts like Uzbekistan and Curaçao yet hampered by historical knockout struggles against elite UEFA and CONMEBOL sides.

markets.question: Will SpaceX raise less than $40B in its IPO?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the total gross proceeds raised by SpaceX in its initial public offering (IPO) at the time of pricing.

The amount raised is defined as the aggregate dollar value of shares sold at the final offering price at the time of IPO pricing, as disclosed in the final prospectus filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.

Shares sold pursuant to any overallotment option (greenshoe) will not be considered.

Secondary sales of existing shares by current shareholders will be included only to the extent that they are part of the IPO offering at pricing and reflected in the total gross proceeds. Private secondary transactions conducted outside of the IPO will not be considered.

If the total proceeds fall exactly on a boundary between two ranges, this market will resolve to the higher range.

If SpaceX does not complete an IPO by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to the lowest bracket.

The primary resolution source will be the final prospectus filed with the SEC; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket reflects deep uncertainty in sizing SpaceX's blockbuster IPO raise, with 50-60 billion dollars and 80-90 billion dollars outcomes deadlocked at 50% implied probabilities each, following the company's April 2026 confidential S-1 filing targeting a June roadshow and potential listing. Recent tender offers valued SpaceX at 800 billion dollars in late 2025, but aggressive targets now exceed 1.75 trillion dollars—driven by Starlink's projected 80% revenue surge to nearly 19 billion dollars—prompt traders to price conservative raise amounts amid IPO market fragility and sky-high multiples over 100 times revenue. Key swing factors include underwriter demand during site visits for anchor investors and macro risk appetite, with the prior Saudi Aramco record of 29 billion dollars underscoring execution risks for this history-making debut.

markets.description:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Incheon United FC and Gangwon FC combine to score 3 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 3, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on kleague.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

eventMetadata.context_description: Incheon United, languishing in 12th place in K League 1 with just 4 points from 5 matches (1 win, 1 draw, 3 losses, 6-9 goal difference), host 6th-placed Gangwon FC (6 points, 6-6 goals) on May 2 at Sungui Arena Park. Incheon's recent form shows vulnerability, particularly at home with back-to-back losses to FC Seoul and Daejeon Hana Citizen, though a 1-0 away win over FC Anyang on March 22 offers slight momentum. Gangwon sits mid-table on balanced goal difference but inconsistent results, including a recent 0-1 loss to Pohang Steelers. No major injuries or suspensions reported; competitive head-to-head history (Gangwon 18 wins to Incheon's 14) and both teams' struggles for consistency shape trader consensus for a tight contest amid Incheon's tough upcoming fixtures against Gimcheon Sangmu and Ulsan HD FC.

markets.question: Will Trump and Putin meet next in another EU country?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the location of the next meeting between Donald Trump and Vladimir Putin between September 30 and June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

This market will resolve to "No meeting by June 30" if no qualifying meeting occurs during this market's timeframe.

A meeting is defined as any encounter where Putin and Trump are all present and interact with each other in person.

An exchange of words, handshake, direct conversation, or other clear personal interaction between the named individuals will qualify as a meeting. Merely standing in proximity, making eye contact, or being present in the same room or event without direct interaction will not qualify.

For this market, Gulf states are defined as the six members of the Gulf Cooperation Council (Bahrain, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, United Arab Emirates).

The primary resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

events.title: Where will Trump and Putin meet next?

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus strongly favors no Trump-Putin meeting by June 30 at 86%, driven by the absence of any announced bilateral summit plans in the near term, despite recent phone diplomacy on Ukraine. A Kremlin readout from late April revealed Putin proposed a May 9 Victory Day ceasefire during a call with Trump, but no in-person follow-up was scheduled, amid persistent war stalemate and Ukrainian skepticism over U.S. mediation. Reports from April 23-24 indicate Trump plans to invite Putin to the December G20 summit at his Miami Doral resort—explicitly after the market window—though Trump doubts attendance. Low odds on locations like China reflect unconfirmed speculation without diplomatic momentum or neutral-site precedents since their 2025 Alaska summit. Geopolitical barriers, including sanctions and NATO tensions, further diminish near-term prospects.

markets.question: Will Sweetgreen (SG) beat quarterly earnings?
markets.description:
As of market creation, Sweetgreen is estimated to release earnings on May 7, 2026. The Street consensus estimate for Sweetgreen's GAAP EPS for the relevant quarter is $-0.23 as of market creation. This market will resolve to "Yes" if Sweetgreen reports GAAP EPS greater than $-0.23 for the relevant quarter in its next quarterly earnings release. Otherwise, it will resolve to "No." The resolution source will be the GAAP EPS listed in the company’s official earnings documents. 

If Sweetgreen releases earnings without GAAP EPS, then the market will resolve according to the GAAP EPS figure reported by SeekingAlpha. If no such figure is published within 96h of market close (4:00:00pm ET) on the day earnings are announced, the market will resolve to “No”.

If the company does not release earnings within 45 calendar days of the estimated earnings date, this market will resolve to “No.” 

Note: Subsequent restatements, corrections, or revisions made to the initially announced GAAP EPS figure will not qualify for resolution, except in the case of obvious and immediate mistakes (e.g., fat finger errors, as with Lyft's (LYFT) earnings release in February 2024).
Note: The strike prices used in these markets are derived from SeekingAlpha estimates, and reflect the consensus of sell-side analyst estimates for GAAP EPS. 
Note: All figures will be rounded to the nearest cent using standard rounding.
Note: For the purposes of this market, IFRS EPS will be treated as GAAP EPS.
Note: For the purposes of this market, GAAP EPS refers to diluted GAAP EPS, unless this is not published, in which case it refers to basic GAAP EPS.
Note: All figures are expressed in USD, unless otherwise indicated.
Note: For primarily internationally listed companies, this market refers specifically to the shares traded in the United States on U.S. stock exchanges such as the NYSE or Nasdaq. In cases where the company trades in the U.S. through an American Depositary Receipt (ADR) or American Depositary Share (ADS), this market will refer to the ADR/ADS.

Recent catalysts include April 30's Chief Development Officer appointment and stock gains tracking fast-casual peers, with results due May 7 after close.

Any replacement of the nominee before election day will not change the resolution of the market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Incumbent Rep. Nikema Williams holds a commanding 97.8% implied probability among traders to win Georgia's 5th Congressional District Democratic primary on May 19, reflecting her entrenched incumbency advantage in the heavily Democratic Atlanta-area seat she succeeded John Lewis in holding. Recent analyses, including a report from last week, highlight her dominance over challengers like former Clayton County Sheriff Victor Hill—recently released from federal prison—Arnetress Beatty, and Andres Castro, with no public polling indicating viable competition and superior fundraising bolstering her position. Early voting began April 27 without disruptions, underscoring trader confidence. Late-breaking scandals, a turnout surge for Hill among local voters, or Williams withdrawal remain remote upset scenarios, given historical incumbent primary win rates exceeding 90% in safe districts.

markets.question: Bayer 04 Leverkusen vs. RB Leipzig: O/U 4.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Bundesliga game between Bayer 04 Leverkusen and RB Leipzig, scheduled for May 2 at 12:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Bayer 04 Leverkusen and RB Leipzig combine to score 5 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 5, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on bundesliga.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

Leverkusen boast a strong recent head-to-head edge, including a 3-1 victory in the reverse fixture at Leipzig in December 2025, bolstered by a healthier squad featuring Tapsoba, Andrich, Palacios, and García in probable lineups. Leipzig contend with defensive absences—David Raum out with groin issues, Ezechiel Banzuzi sidelined by knee injury—though Castello Lukeba is nearing return from adductor problems and Nicolas Seiwald resumes training post-illness. With two matchdays remaining, table positions, home form, and injury updates drive shifting probabilities in this pivotal top-four battle.

markets.question: Will South Korea ETF (EWY) hit (LOW) $147 Week of April 27 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during the week of April 27 2026, any 1-minute candle for South Korea ETF (EWY) has a final "Low" price equal to or below the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the South Korea ETF (EWY) "Low" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.EWY%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.EWY%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily low price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

eventMetadata.context_description: The iShares MSCI South Korea ETF (EWY) notched a 52-week high of $161.55 during the week of April 27, 2026, propelled by the KOSPI index's explosive 30% April rally to record levels above 6,700, with intraday peaks near 6,750. This momentum stems from semiconductor heavyweights Samsung Electronics (22% weighting) and SK hynix (19%), riding surging DRAM prices amid global AI infrastructure buildout and memory chip demand recovery. A weaker U.S. dollar and Fed rate cut expectations further bolstered exporter sentiment, evidenced by EWY's YTD return exceeding 58% and trading volume spiking to 16.7 million shares. Traders eye potential "sell in May" pullbacks alongside Q1 earnings from tech leaders and Bank of Korea policy signals as key near-term catalysts.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Helsinki be 22°C on May 2?

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Helsinki Vantaa Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/fi/vantaa/EFHK.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket implies a highest temperature around 19–20°C for Helsinki on May 2, reflecting the latest numerical weather prediction model ensembles from ECMWF and GFS, which forecast mild conditions under a high-pressure ridge ushering southerly airflow and above-average temperatures for early May (climatological high ~12–13°C). Differentiating factors include ensemble spread: core runs cluster at 19°C with partial cloud cover tempering peaks, while warmer outliers reach 20–21°C under clearer skies and stronger insolation, moderated by Baltic Sea breezes. Finnish Meteorological Institute observations today show highs near 14°C, building toward tomorrow's peak; check evening forecast updates for refined guidance amid inherent model uncertainty in boundary-layer mixing.

This above-seasonal positioning—May climatological highs average 23-24°C per historical INMET data—stems from a persistent atmospheric blocking pattern over Brazil, stalling polar air masses and enabling high-pressure ridging for enhanced solar insolation despite cloudiness. Recent late-April warmth, with highs exceeding 29°C, reinforces the mild trend absent cold fronts. Forecast models exhibit ±1°C spread; monitor INMET's hourly updates and Congonhas Airport observations for resolution, with overnight GFS/ECMWF runs potentially refining odds.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus slightly favors Como 1907 at 41.5% implied probability to win at home against SSC Napoli, reflecting the visitors' ongoing injury crisis with key absences including Romelu Lukaku (muscular), Giovanni Di Lorenzo (knee), David Neres, and Antonio Vergara sidelined amid a tough campaign for Antonio Conte's second-placed side on 69 points. Como, fifth with 61 points, boasts strong home form with 11 wins from 20 Stadio Giuseppe Sinigaglia matches this season, bolstered by recent momentum after knocking Napoli out of Coppa Italia on penalties (1-1 draw, 7-6 shootout) in February. Como misses Jayden Addai (knee) and Sergi Roberto (muscle), but Cesc Fàbregas' squad enters off mixed results— one win in last five—while Napoli has lost just once in eight, making this a closely contested Serie A clash with draw at 29.5%.

markets.question: Ponchet vs. Golubic: Match O/U 22.5
markets.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Jessika Ponchet and Viktorija Golubic in the Saint-Malo, originally scheduled for May 1, 2026 at 6:30AM ET.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed across all sets equals or exceeds 23. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
All tiebreaks—including any Champions/Super tiebreak—count as one (1) game toward the total.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official WTA Challenger statistics.
markets.groupItemTitle: Saint-Malo: Jessika Ponchet vs Viktorija Golubic Match O/U 22.5

events.title: Saint-Malo: Jessika Ponchet vs Viktorija Golubic
events.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Jessika Ponchet and Viktorija Golubic in the Saint-Malo, originally scheduled for May 1, 2026 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Jessika Ponchet' if Jessika Ponchet advances against Viktorija Golubic.

This market will resolve to 'Viktorija Golubic' if Viktorija Golubic advances against Jessika Ponchet.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Viktorija Golubic enters as the clear ranking favorite at No. 81 and No. 4 seed against No. 196 Jessika Ponchet in the Saint-Malo WTA 125 clay quarterfinals, but Ponchet's home-court edge as a French player on her preferred surface and their even 1-1 head-to-head record—Ponchet's 2023 Osaka win—keep it competitive. Ponchet advanced with a 6-1, 0-1 retirement over compatriot Fiona Ferro in the round of 32 and a gritty 6-3, 7-6(5) decision against Yasmine Kabbaj in the round of 16. Golubic posted straight-sets 6-3, 6-2 over wildcard Clara Burel before rallying from a set down to beat Whitney Osuigwe 2-6, 6-2, 6-2. No reported injuries; outdoor clay conditions and crowd support could boost Ponchet's baseline game.

This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Wuhan Tianhe International Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 2 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Wuhan Tianhe International Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/cn/wuhan/ZHHH.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Latest forecasts from the China Meteorological Administration project a high of 21°C at Wuhan Tianhe International Airport on May 2, amid persistent rain and near-100% cloud cover from a passing frontal system, fueling trader sentiment favoring 21°C (43%) over 20°C (38%). This marks a sharp drop from May 1's observed 26°C under overcast skies, as moist southerly flow and showers suppress solar heating during peak afternoon hours. Model consensus shows minor divergence: brief lulls in precipitation could nudge peaks to 21°C, while steady rain favors 20°C or lower, reflecting inherent uncertainty in short-range precipitation timing. Climatological early-May highs average 25-26°C, but current synoptic patterns dominate; monitor hourly airport observations for resolution.

The resolution source for this market will be information from NOAA, specifically the highest reading under the "Temp" column on the specified date once information is finalized for all hours on that date, available here: https://www.weather.gov/wrh/timeseries?site=LLBG

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the "Switch to Metric Units" button until the relevant table displays °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until data for this date has been finalized.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket evenly splits at 50% across 18°C or below, 19°C, and 20°C for Tel Aviv's May 3 high temperature, mirroring substantial uncertainty in short-range forecasts from the Israel Meteorological Service (IMS) and global models like GFS and ECMWF. Recent IMS data shows May 1 highs at 22°C under partly cloudy skies—cooler than the typical early May average of 24–26°C—driven by northerly winds and lingering cooler air masses from a wetter March. Differing model ensembles highlight key variables: potential cloud cover increases (up to 80% precip chance in some runs) and sea breeze intensification could cap peaks at 18–19°C, while clearer conditions favor 20°C. New 00Z and 12Z model updates expected within 24 hours may clarify steering patterns and temperature anomalies.

markets.question: Will Los Angeles Lakers advance to the 2026 NBA Finals?
markets.description:
This market will resolve “Yes” if the listed team advances to the NBA Finals of the 2026 NBA Playoffs. 

If at any point it becomes impossible for the listed team to reach the 2026 NBA Finals (e.g. they are eliminated), the associated market will resolve to "No".

If the 2026 NBA Playoffs are cancelled, postponed after June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET or the results of the 2026 Playoffs Conference Finals have not been declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “No”.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from the NBA (https://www.nba.com/); however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: With first-round NBA playoff series concluding amid a league-wide injury crisis as of May 1, trader sentiment hinges on health, depth, and early momentum for conference finals paths. The Oklahoma City Thunder swept Phoenix, showcasing Shai Gilgeous-Alexander's dominance and Chet Holmgren's rim protection, while San Antonio advanced past Portland leveraging Victor Wembanyama's availability despite his recent concussion protocol. Minnesota upset Denver in Game 6 without Anthony Edwards, highlighting Julius Randle's impact, but Luka Doncic's hamstring and Austin Reaves' oblique absences jeopardize Lakers' edge over Houston in their decisive Game 6. East sees Orlando leading Detroit 3-2, Philadelphia tying Boston 3-3 sans Joel Embiid, and New York clinching versus Atlanta. Conference semifinals starting May 4 emphasize rest advantages, home-court splits, and back-to-back fatigue for surviving contenders.

markets.question: Will Doja Cat have a #1 song on the Billboard Hot 100 in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if any song by the listed artist is the number 1 song in any official weekly Billboard Hot 100 songs chart released for a data collection reference period entirely between January 1 and December 31, 2026. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

Any song released with the listed artist as a primary artist will count, including songs released before 2026. If a song is released jointly by multiple artists credited equally as primary artists, it will count for all of them. Features, writing credits, production credits, or other forms of non-primary contributions to a song will not count. Artist attribution will be determined solely by the artists displayed by Billboard on the relevant chart.

Billboard updates its Hot 100 songs chart each Tuesday (with adjusted release schedules on some holiday weeks), reflecting data collected in the previous week (Friday-Thursday). Each Billboard chart is then titled “Week of (date of the upcoming Saturday)”. The first Billboard Hot 100 song chart relevant to this market will be the chart titled “Week of January 17, 2026” for a data collection reference period of January 2-8, 2026. The final Billboard Hot 100 song chart relevant to this market will be the Chart titled “Week of January 9, 2027” for a data collection reference period of December 25-31, 2026.

Updates or revisions made within this market’s timeframe to the #1-ranked song on previously published Billboard Hot 100 charts will be considered; however, such updates will not disqualify a previously published Billboard Hot 100 #1 song from counting. If a Billboard Hot 100 #1 song is revised after initial publication, both the originally published #1 song and the revised #1 song will count for this market. Updates or revisions made after the release of the final Billboard Hot 100 song chart relevant to this market will not be considered.

The resolution source for this market will be the weekly Billboard Hot 100 songs charts published each week at https://www.billboard.com/charts/hot-100/ and through other official Billboard channels.

eventMetadata.context_description: As of the Billboard Hot 100 chart dated May 2, 2026, nine artists—including Taylor Swift (two #1s), Olivia Rodrigo ("Drop Dead" returning to the top), Ella Langley ("Choosin' Texas" with a record seven weeks), BTS ("Swim"), and Bruno Mars ("I Just Might," sweeping all component charts)—have already notched number-ones this year, resolving "Yes" for those Polymarket outcomes and reflecting strong early-year streaming and radio momentum. Trader consensus for open markets favors climbers like sombr ("Potential") and Lana Del Rey ("First Light"), with Kalshi odds giving Ariana Grande an 83% implied probability for a historic 10th #1 amid her promotional push. Upcoming releases from heavyweights like Madonna and major summer singles will test competition, as chart lock dates and precursor streaming metrics drive rapid shifts through December.

markets.description:

If no 2026 Oklahoma Republican Senate Primary takes place, this market will resolve to "Other".

The resolution source for this market will be the first announcement of the results from the Oklahoma Republican party, however an overwhelming consensus of credible reporting may suffice.

eventMetadata.context_description: Rep. Kevin Hern's 90.5% implied probability in the Oklahoma Republican Senate primary reflects trader consensus on his commanding position to succeed Sen. Markwayne Mullin, whose March nomination as DHS Secretary opened the Class II seat. Trump's swift endorsement after Hern's March 11 announcement prompted Gov. Kevin Stitt and Rep. Stephanie Bice to withdraw, bolstering Hern's fundraising lead of over $2 million in cash on hand and securing nods from Senate Majority Leader John Thune, Sen. Tim Scott, and Club for Growth. The April filing deadline produced a fragmented field of lesser-known challengers like Wayne Lonny Washington. With no major developments in the past 30 days, odds remain firm ahead of the June 16 primary, though a scandal, legal challenge, or late health issue could disrupt Hern's path.

markets.question: Will Hunter Brown strike out the most batters during the 2026 MLB regular season?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the pitcher who records the most strikeouts among pitchers during the 2026 Major League Baseball regular season.

In the event of a tie, this market will resolve according to the official leader as determined by the rules of the MLB. If multiple leaders are announced then this market will resolve to the pitcher that records fewer innings pitched during the 2026 MLB regular season. If a tie still persists, this market will resolve in favor of the pitcher that records the lower ERA during the 2026 MLB regular season. If a tie still persists, then this market will resolve in favor of the pitcher that walked fewer batters during the 2026 MLB regular season. If a tie still persists, this market will resolve to the pitcher whose listed last name comes first alphabetically.

If the 2026 MLB regular season is cancelled, postponed after October 15, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, or there is otherwise no official leader declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from MLB; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Will the Republican Party win the PA-06 House seat?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the PA-06 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

eventMetadata.context_description: Incumbent Democrat Chrissy Houlahan's commanding position in Pennsylvania's 6th Congressional District drives trader consensus at 92.5% for the Democratic Party ahead of the May 19 primaries, reflecting her four consecutive general election victories—including 56% in 2024—and the district's D+6 partisan lean anchored in reliably blue Chester County suburbs with college-educated voters. Houlahan faces no Democratic primary challengers after a rival withdrew, while Republican Marty Young remains the sole GOP filer without notable traction or national attention. This stability persists absent recent catalysts, with low trading volume underscoring sustained conviction. Potential shifts could arise from a stronger GOP nominee emerging post-primary, a Houlahan scandal or health issue, or a national Republican midterm wave overcoming the seat's entrenched Democratic path to victory.

markets.question: Will Drake feature Lil Durk on ICEMAN?

To qualify as "featured", the listed artist must be credited on at least one song on the album according to at least one major streaming platform: namely Spotify, Apple Music, Amazon Music, or YouTube Music.

If the album fails to release by December 31, 2026, 11:59PM ET, this market will resolve to "No". 

The resolution source of this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

Elise Stefanik's decision not to seek re-election, underscores Republican advantages in this R+10 Cook PVI battleground, where Donald Trump carried 60% in 2024 and GOP nominees won 59-62% in recent cycles. Trader consensus at 65.5% for Republicans reflects the district's structural lean and strong historical performance, tempered by a competitive June 23 Republican primary between Trump-endorsed Anthony Constantino—who leads in fundraising with over $3.5 million cash on hand—and party-backed Assemblyman Robert Smullen, per recent internal polling showing Smullen ahead 43-33%. Democrats face a fragmented primary led by Blake Gendebien's fundraising edge, with no general election polls yet shifting the balance ahead of November 3.

Jose Soriano has surged to 13% on a historic Angels hot start—5-1, 0.84 ERA, 49 Ks across 42.2 innings, including five scoreless outings early and a skyrocketing 29.6% strikeout rate—elevating him in the first MLB poll. Yankees rookie Cam Schlittler trails closely at 12% with a 0.74 ERA lead, showcasing fastball dominance and eight Ks in his debut, while Dylan Cease's move to Toronto and sub-2.00 FIP keep him viable at 9% in this wide-open rotation race defined by early workload and health.

markets.question: Dogecoin Up or Down - May 1, 9AM ET
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the DOGE/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the DOGE/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/DOGE_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance DOGE/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

eventMetadata.context_description: Hong Kong Observatory (HKO) observations confirm the highest air temperature on April 30, 2026, reached 26.7°C, driving trader consensus to 100% implied probability for 25°C or higher amid an exceptionally warm April marked by southerly and easterly airstreams earlier in the month. Despite a cold front on April 29 ushering in a lingering northeast monsoon that cooled mornings and brought mainly cloudy conditions, daytime heating still pushed maxima well above the threshold, consistent with historical April norms where mean maximums hover around 26–28°C. This positioning reflects verified meteorological data from HKO's standard instrumentation, with negligible risk of revision barring equipment anomalies—scenarios that rarely alter official records post-publication.

markets.question: Counter-Strike: Johnny Speeds vs Lilmix (BO1) - Esplay Elite Gaming Group A
markets.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Johnny Speeds and Lilmix in the Esplay Elite Gaming Group A, initially scheduled for May 1 at 2:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Johnny Speeds" if Johnny Speeds win the match against Lilmix.

This market will resolve to "Lilmix" if Lilmix win the match against Johnny Speeds.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

Johnny Speeds' recent form includes a 1-2 loss to illwill two days ago but solid cup finishes like 2nd in ESL Challenger League Europe Cup 3; they excel on Overpass (82% win rate) and Mirage. Lilmix, fresh off roster changes with Jackinho and Wonder joining mid-April, notched qualifier wins over STATE and Ursa last week but struggle overall (32% win rate), weak on Dust2 (11%). BO1 volatility and no head-to-head amplify upset potential in this Helsingborg LAN round-robin, where top three advance from Group A featuring INFINITE and frIENDS.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Beijing be 29°C on May 1?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Beijing Capital International Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 1 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Beijing Capital International Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/cn/beijing/ZBAA.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket has locked in 26°C as the highest temperature at Beijing Capital International Airport on May 1, driven by the latest China Meteorological Administration forecasts projecting a daytime peak of 26°C under persistent cloudy skies and light easterly winds below 12 km/h. These conditions limit solar insolation, capping heating potential in line with early May climatology, where historical highs average around 26°C amid spring's transitional weather patterns. Official model runs from weather.com.cn and the World Meteorological Centre Beijing reinforce this outlook with no significant disagreements. While inherent forecast uncertainty persists—such as unexpected afternoon clearing allowing extra warming—finalized observations via Wunderground's ZBAA station data, expected soon after midnight, will confirm resolution; deviations above 26°C would require atypical radiative forcing.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket heavily favors 12°C (43%) and 11°C (37.5%) as Istanbul's highest temperature on May 2, reflecting tight spread in the latest ECMWF and GFS ensemble forecasts amid an incoming cold snap. Northerly winds are advecting cool continental air from the Balkans, with persistent cloud cover and rain chances—warned by Turkish State Meteorological Service—limiting diurnal heating and capping highs well below the early May climatological average of around 20°C. Differentiating factors include model disagreements on exact cloud clearance timing and wind shear intensity: drier scenarios could nudge toward 13°C (11.5%), while heavier showers favor 11°C or below. New 12z model runs and May 1 observations will refine this uncertainty before resolution.

markets.question: Will the Fed’s lower bound reach 0.5% or lower before 2027?
markets.description:
The FED interest rates are defined in this market by the lower or the upper bound of the target federal funds range. The decisions on the target federal fund range are made by the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meetings.

This market will resolve to “Yes” if the lower or the upper bound of the target federal funds rate reaches the specified level at any point by December 31, 2026, 12:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No.”

Emergency rate cuts and hikes outside the regularly scheduled meetings will be considered.

The resolution source for this market is the official website of the Federal Reserve at:
https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/openmarket.htm.

This market may resolve as soon as the relevant data showing the reached level is published.

eventMetadata.context_description: The Federal Reserve maintained its federal funds target range at 3.50%-3.75% following the April 28-29, 2026 FOMC meeting, citing solid economic expansion, little-changed unemployment around 4.3%, and elevated inflation partly driven by global energy price surges, with March 2026 CPI at 3.3% year-over-year. One dissenter favored a 25-basis-point cut, signaling internal debate amid softening job gains. CME FedWatch Tool implies near-certainty of no change at the June 16-17 meeting, aligning with March dot plot median of 3.4% by end-2026. Traders eye April nonfarm payrolls (May 8 release) and CPI (May 12) for signals on potential easing trajectory before 2027, as markets price in modest rate declines absent renewed inflationary pressures.

eventMetadata.context_description: Hong Kong Observatory (HKO) observations confirm the highest air temperature on April 30, 2026, reached 26.7°C, driving trader consensus to 100% implied probability for 25°C or higher amid an exceptionally warm April marked by southerly and easterly airstreams earlier in the month. Despite a cold front on April 29 ushering in a lingering northeast monsoon that cooled mornings and brought mainly cloudy conditions, daytime heating still pushed maxima well above the threshold, consistent with historical April norms where mean maximums hover around 26–28°C. This positioning reflects verified meteorological data from HKO's standard instrumentation, with negligible risk of revision barring equipment anomalies—scenarios that rarely alter official records post-publication.

markets.question: Tianjin Jinmen Hu FC vs. Wuhan San Zhen FC: O/U 4.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Chinese Super League game between Tianjin Jinmen Hu FC and Wuhan San Zhen FC, scheduled for May 1 at 7:35 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Tianjin Jinmen Hu FC and Wuhan San Zhen FC combine to score 5 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 5, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on csl-china.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Tianjin Jinmen Hu FC vs. Wuhan San Zhen FC - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Chinese Super League game, scheduled for May 1 at 7:35 AM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Tianjin Jinmen Tiger host Wuhan Three Towns in Chinese Super League Matchday 9 at TEDA Football Stadium, with trader consensus shaped by Tianjin's dismal start—16th place after three winless matches (0-1-2, goalless with four conceded) exacerbated by a 10-point deduction for ethics violations—and Wuhan's more balanced mid-table position (11th, 1-1-1, +1 goal difference despite five-point deduction). Recent results highlight Tianjin's stalemate in a 0-0 draw versus Chongqing Tonglianglong, while Wuhan notched a 4-1 home win over Dalian Yingbo under new manager Benjamín Mora. Head-to-head slightly favors Wuhan (five wins to Tianjin's three), but home advantage and relegation pressure could fuel an upset potential.

markets.question: Will the Republican Party win the SC-02 House seat?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the SC-02 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus prices a Republican Party victory at 82% implied probability in the SC-02 House race, anchored by incumbent Rep. Joe Wilson's long tenure since 2001, his 59.7% 2024 general election margin, and the district's R+7 Cook Partisan Voting Index where Trump carried it by 14 points. Wilson's fundraising dominance—with $294,000 cash on hand as of March—far exceeds GOP primary challengers Hamp Redmond and Sam Gibbons ahead of the June 9 primaries. The Democratic field remains fragmented among David Robinson II, Zyon Khalifa, Roger Pruitt, and Daniel Shrief, contributing to the party's 18% odds. Candidate-specific markets for A (likely Wilson proxy), B, and Other near 50% reflect nominee uncertainty, with no polls or major developments in the past 30 days shifting dynamics; ratings hold at Solid Republican.

eventMetadata.context_description: Latest National Weather Service Los Angeles forecasts and model consensus from GFS and ECMWF indicate a persistent marine layer—low stratus clouds driven by cool sea surface temperatures and onshore flow—will cap highest temperatures in downtown Los Angeles at 68-69°F on May 2, aligning with the 42% trader-implied probability. This pattern, characteristic of "May Gray," has dominated Southern California over the past week, as seen in late April observations where similar cloud cover suppressed highs below seasonal norms of 73°F. Partial afternoon clearing could push toward 70-71°F (20% odds), but uncertainty remains around burn-off timing; watch evening model updates from NOAA for shifts before resolution based on official downtown observations.

markets.question: Will Elon Musk post 500-519 tweets from April 24 to May 1, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the number of times Elon Musk (@elonmusk), posts on X from April 24 12:00 PM ET to May 1, 2026 12:00 PM ET.

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies on the main feed such as https://x.com/elonmusk/status/1786073478711353576 will be counted by the tracker.

Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes).

Community reposts which are not counted by the tracker not count toward the total.

The resolution source for this market is the 'Post Counter' figure for posts found at https://xtracker.polymarket.com. Individual posts can be viewed by clicking "Export Data". If the tracker does not update correctly in accordance with the rules, X itself may be used as a secondary resolution source.

eventMetadata.context_description: Verified trackers report Elon Musk has posted 184 times on X from April 24 12:00 PM ET through early May 1, aligning with a consistent daily average of 26 updates over the seven-day period ending at noon ET today. This steady posting rhythm, including a spike to 38 posts on April 27 amid his high-profile OpenAI trial testimony from April 28-30, has solidified trader consensus at 97.5% implied probability for 180-199 total posts, reflecting the wisdom of crowds with over $7 million in volume. With mere hours remaining, a late surge—such as responses to breaking news on Tesla, SpaceX, or politics—could push totals into 200+, though historical patterns suggest limited final-day activity.

markets.question: Will New England Patriots win the 2026 AFC East?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the team that is declared as the AFC East division champion for the 2026 NFL regular season.

If multiple teams tie atop the division, this market will resolve according to the official tiebreak procedure of the NFL.

If the 2026 NFL regular season is cancelled, postponed after January 17, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, or there is otherwise no winner declared for this division within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the NFL; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Buffalo Bills hold a slim 55% trader consensus to repeat as AFC East champions, bolstered by Josh Allen's elite quarterback play and a draft class reinforcing their trenches with high-upside linemen like OT Caleb Lomu, following their consistent divisional dominance amid New England Patriots' 2025 playoff deep run to the AFC Championship. The Pats sit at 34.5% after Drake Maye's breakout sophomore campaign propelled their surprise division lead and Super Bowl berth loss, but offseason roster turnover and a tougher projected schedule temper expectations despite EDGE and TE additions. Jets (7.5%) and Dolphins (7.1%) trail amid Aaron Rodgers' age/injury risks and Tua Tagovailoa's fragility, with both teams' drafts yielding modest upgrades in a rebuilding phase.

markets.question: Series: Anyone's Legend Kill Handicap (-10.5) vs Weibo Gaming (+10.5)
markets.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Anyone's Legend and Weibo Gaming in the LPL Group Ascend, scheduled for January 20 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Anyone's Legend" if Anyone's Legend secures 11 or more kills than Weibo Gaming in the match. 

Otherwise, it will resolve to "Weibo Gaming".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.
markets.groupItemTitle: Series: Anyone's Legend Kill Handicap (-10.5) vs Weibo Gaming (+10.5)

events.title: LoL: Anyone's Legend vs Weibo Gaming (BO3) - LPL Group Ascend
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Anyone's Legend" if Anyone's Legend win against Weibo Gaming in the named LoL match in the LPL Group Ascend, scheduled for January 20 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Weibo Gaming" if Weibo Gaming win against Anyone's Legend in the LoL match.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.

If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/leagueoflegends/Main_Page.

eventMetadata.context_description: Anyone's Legend enters this LPL Split 2 Group Ascend BO3 atop the standings at 5-3 after a commanding 2-0 sweep over Invictus Gaming, fueled by Tarzan's elite jungle pathing and Flandre's top-lane dominance with their unchanged 2026 roster including Shanks, Hope, and Kael. Weibo Gaming sits mid-pack but gained momentum with a 2-0 upset of Top Esports, leveraging Xiaohu's mid-lane experience, Elk's ADC firepower, and new additions Zika and Jiejie in their rebuilt lineup. AL previously whitewashed WBG 2-0 earlier in the split, yet WBG's recent macro improvements signal a competitive series; pivotal jungle duel between Tarzan and Jiejie and playoff positioning amplify stakes.
